## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Town.com and GrowthX to discuss content production, blog performance, and future marketing strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is behind schedule; aim for 5 posts/week ready for tax review by Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Blog traffic is picking up, with organic views increasing for published articles](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Plans to discuss direct and demand strategy for the next 6-9 months in a separate meeting](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Need to improve blog operations before expanding GrowthX's involvement](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Challenges

  - [Currently not meeting the goal of 5 posts/week](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Only 20 posts published since mid-July](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Recent slowdown due to internal/external linking issues](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Action: Aim for 5 posts ready for tax review by Tuesday, publish 5/week](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Suggestion: Build a buffer of 6-7 posts ahead to account for feedback and delays](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Blog Performance

  - [Organic traffic analysis from July 30 to August 26](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Top performing articles:](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [FIIR PTA compliance guide: 26 views](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [Startup tax credits savings guide: 21 views](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Other articles starting to see views and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Positive trend expected as seed announcement traffic decreases](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)

### Operational Improvements

  - [Need for better communication about process delays or issues](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Suggestion to prioritize content creation over perfecting links initially](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Discussion about implementing LLM.txt (action item to follow up with Daryl)](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Consideration of creating a "shadow blog" (to be evaluated)](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

### Future Marketing Strategies

  - [Plan to discuss direct and demand strategy for next 6-9 months](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Kyle to provide insights based on experience (e.g., from Homebase)](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Town.com to prepare hypotheses and objectives for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Focus on testing hypotheses for the coming tax season and 18-month outlook](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ehtisham to follow up on Slack regarding LLM.txt progress](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Kyle to investigate and address operational issues in content production](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Pier to schedule a separate 45-minute meeting with Kyle to discuss marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Pier to prepare two potential scenarios/hypotheses for the marketing strategy meeting](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Continue publishing the long-form content (30 tax deductions post)](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Team to work on getting ahead in content production, aiming for 6-7 posts buffer](https://fathom.video/share/sBjoFXjErHuE8dxEP5qxYYyd4yNrsUsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
